title: PRESCRIPTION SAVINGS CARDS - 211info
text: SINGLECARE PRESCRIPTION SAVINGS CARDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides discount cards for immediate savings on most Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved prescription medications. Offers a "Drug Price Lookup Tool" which provides real-time prices and compares prices across pharmacies. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email - (844) 234-3057 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (844) 234-3057 Text Short Code 700700 Text the word family Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Provides information by phone, text, website, or through the SingleCare app. Savings cards can be downloaded or requested by mail. After receiving the card, individuals present it at the pharmacy with each prescription to receive the lowest available price, including the SingleCare discounted rate, pharmacy price, or insurance price if enrolled in a health plan FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Prescription Drug Discount Cards If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
